title: .NET Application Programmer
description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a skilled Application Programmer to provide application support for our .NET-based software systems. The role involves troubleshooting, maintaining, and enhancing existing applications to ensure optimal performance and reliability.

The ideal candidate will have strong technical expertise in .NET technologies, coding, excellent problem-solving skills, SQL and the ability to collaborate effectively with development and infrastructure teams.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Provide technical support and maintenance for .NET applications (C#) and related systems.
  • Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve application issues promptly to minimize downtime.
  • Collaborate with development teams to deploy updates, patches, and enhancements.
  • Monitor application performance and proactively identify potential problems.
  • Document support activities, issue resolutions, and maintain knowledge base articles.
  • Analyse user requirements and recommend improvements for application stability and efficiency.
  • Work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration and operation of applications.

Required Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related engineering field.
  • Proven experience in development or application support, ideally 2+ years.
  • Strong knowledge of .NET Framework (C#), MS-SQL/MySQL, Scripting (PowerShell).
  • Experience with application troubleshooting, debugging, and performance optimization.
  • Familiarity with software deployment and maintenance processes.
  • Excellent communication and customer service skills.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment.
  • Detail-oriented with strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

Preferred Skills:

  • Knowledge of Power Shell scripting.
  • Experience with Cloud (M365/AWS), SaaS applications and SQL Server.
  • Knowledge of application monitoring tools and performance metrics.
  • Familiarity with version control systems and software development lifecycle.
  • Strong documentation skills and ability to create technical specifications

Interested applicants please send your resume to venessagoh@recruitexpress.com.sg

Venessa Goh Wee Ni

R24124686

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License No: 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
